knowledge/auth-choice.name: We use Supabase Auth, not Clerk
knowledge/auth-choice.summary: Picked Supabase Auth because the same client also handles RLS-aware DB access. Trade-off: less polish on the social-login UI compared to Clerk.

knowledge/role-not-null.name: user.role is never null after registration
knowledge/role-not-null.summary: Set in the post-signup trigger (handle_new_user). Any code path that creates a user without going through that trigger must set the role explicitly.

knowledge/stripe-amount-zero.name: Stripe webhooks fail silently if amount = 0
knowledge/stripe-amount-zero.summary: Charge intents with amount = 0 are accepted by Stripe but never produce a charge.succeeded event. Validate amount > 0 before creating the intent.

knowledge/db-client.name: Supabase client (server)
knowledge/db-client.summary: Server-side Supabase client. Uses cookies() for auth context.

knowledge/auth-choice|knowledge/db-clien.note: Supabase Auth and the db client share the same SDK
